name: Madhya Pradesh Mukhyamantri Udyam Kranti Yojana
administered_by: Department of MSME, Government of Madhya Pradesh
retrieval_text: The Madhya Pradesh Mukhyamantri Udyam Kranti Yojana provides bank-linked self-employment loans from Rs 1 lakh to Rs 50 lakh with a 3% interest subvention for manufacturing units and 2% for service and retail trade units, payable directly to the borrower's bank account for 7 years. Collateral guarantee cover is provided through CGTMSE, enabling collateral-free lending up to Rs 50 lakh. The scheme targets new enterprises promoted by Madhya Pradesh residents between the ages of 18-40 in manufacturing, service, or retail trade sectors. Applicant must have at least a Class 12 education. Apply through the MP state e-portal at samast.mponline.gov.in.
documents_required: Bank Passbook/Statement of Applicant's Savings Account
Business Address Proof (e.g., rent agreement, utility bill)
Self-declaration/Affidavit (regarding eligibility criteria, no prior defaults)
